steps.title: Evaluate $f(4)$ and $g(4)$
steps.content: $f(4)=4+5=9$ and $g(4)=5\cdot 4 = 20$. Evaluate each function at the same input before applying the outside coefficients; otherwise the expression $7f(4)-g(4)$ cannot be simplified correctly.

steps.title: Combine
steps.content:
$$7f(4)-g(4) = 7(9) - 20 = 63 - 20 = 43$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
